This is a test file with various tags.

@note This is a simple note tag.
@todo(priority=1, description="Fix the bug")
@bookmark(url="https://example.com", title="Example Site")
@tag(positional1, positional2)
@tag(key=value, name="hello world")
@tag(num=42, hex=0xff, float=3.14)

An email address like user@example.com should NOT be parsed as a tag.

@_private_tag(secret=true)
@-hyphen-tag(test=1)
